title: XaerosCobblemon
description: Adds Pokémon icons to Xaero's Minimap
body:
# XaerosCobblemon

Simple resource pack that adds Pokémon icons to your Xaero's Minimap for **all** Cobblemon available!

**NOTE:** This resource pack is generated programmatically, if you encounter any issues please report them to me in the Cobblemon discord! @accieo

# Versions

There's two versions available:

1. **Default version**: Uses the default sprites.
2. **Shiny stars version**: Adds shiny stars to shiny Pokémon to make them easier to spot.

You can pick the one you'd like in the versions tab!

# Credits

All credit for the sprites goes to the respective creators and maintainers:
[Credits Sheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1kI_PDXnbghxjN2LBvxA6Pz-QqMYlVGN3Z1EivXOYwNY/edit#gid=0)
